name: Lamb Chops with Orange Sauce in the Slow Cooker
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
In a skillet, brown the lamb chops in oil; drain well. Thoroughly combine orange juice, honey, salt, cornstarch, and grated orange peel. Brush the browned lamb chops with the orange mixture and place them in the Crock-Pot. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours.
If a thicker sauce is desired, remove the chops before serving and turn the Crock-Pot to High setting; stir in a mixture of 2 tablespoons cornstarch and 1/4 cup water. Cook, stirring until the sauce is transparent.
